features.name: CLI Foundation
features.description: Initialize TypeScript project, Commander command surface, shared output path, and baseline verification.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11: npm install, npm run check, npm test, and npm run build. Built CLI smoke command returned placeholder analysis JSON.

features.name: Longbridge Data Access
features.description: Implement Longbridge CLI adapter for quote, candlesticks, and portfolio data with schema validation.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11: Longbridge quote, candlesticks, and portfolio adapter methods parse fixture payloads with Zod schemas. Tests: 4 files / 7 tests.

features.name: Indicator System
features.description: Implement MA, MACD Histogram, RSI, ATR, Force Index, VWAP, Elder-Ray, and divergence primitives.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. Implemented MA, MACD, RSI, ATR, Force Index, Elder-Ray, VWAP, and divergence primitives with fixture tests.

features.name: Triple Screen And Momentum
features.description: Implement Triple Screen filters, market regime handling, and momentum score system.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. Implemented Triple Screen, market regime detection, and momentum scoring with system tests.

features.name: Structure And Divergence
features.description: Implement support/resistance scoring and MACD, RSI, and Force Index divergence analysis.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. Implemented swing/MA support-resistance and MACD/Force Index divergence signals.

features.name: Risk And Position Planning
features.description: Implement position sizing, stops, targets, risk/reward grading, and portfolio risk aggregation.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. Implemented 2% position sizing, stop/target engines, RR grading, and portfolio risk aggregation.

features.name: Trade Quality And Reports
features.description: Implement trade quality scoring and JSON/Markdown reports for analyze and report commands.
features.evidence: ./init.sh passed on 2026-05-11. All 6 CLI commands validated against live Longbridge data. Fixed schema mismatch, rate limiting, and option symbol handling. 6 test files / 19 tests pass.

features.name: Data Provider Abstraction
features.description: Define stable market and portfolio provider contracts so command and analysis code depend on Trade Living interfaces instead of Longbridge CLI details.
features.evidence: Implemented provider contracts, offline provider, and provider factory. CLI, quote/kline/holdings services now depend on provider interfaces instead of LongbridgeCliAdapter. Verification on 2026-05-11: npm run check, npm test (7 files / 21 tests), npm run build, and ./init.sh passed.

features.name: Longbridge SDK Or API Provider
features.description: Add a Longbridge SDK/API-backed provider implementation behind the same provider contracts, leaving Longbridge CLI as a fallback data source.

features.name: Adapter Contract Test Matrix
features.description: Add fixture-driven contract tests that lock external payload normalization into stable internal Quote, KLine, and Holding models.

features.name: AI JSON Output Contract
features.description: Document and test the stable JSON response shape intended for AI callers, including backward-compatible field evolution rules.

features.name: Markdown Interpretation Template
features.description: Upgrade analysis Markdown output into a reusable interpretation template with highlighted priorities, icon markers, tables, and visual price/risk sections for AI-facing reports.
features.evidence: Implemented structured analysis Markdown template with highlighted conclusion, colored signal badges, icon markers, score bars, price ladder, risk warnings, and trade plan checklist. Added markdown reporter test. Verification on 2026-05-11: ./init.sh passed with 8 test files / 22 tests.
